'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 14''' was published in November [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The Machines That Make Lines Move", by [[John May]]: an article on [[Larry Cuba]], and the use of the then-new art of computer animation for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original film]].
*"[[Star Wars]] and the Effect Pioneers", by [[Jon Trux]]: an article on the revolution in movie and television special effects sparked by ''Star Wars''.
*"War in Space—Fact and Fiction", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an article on the actual (as of 1978) and potential [[Wikipedia:Militarisation of space|Militarisation of space]] in the real world.

==Media==
